turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'd like to make an appointment to see a doctor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! What's the reason for your visit today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, I have a headache, but I'm pregnant, so what can you do for me?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I understand. We definitely want to make sure you're comfortable and safe. So, how far along are you in your pregnancy right now?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It is 12 weeks.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. Twelve weeks, that’s good to know. And have you had any other symptoms besides the headache, or is that the main thing you’re concerned about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I have a little headache and maybe I have a cold.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I see. A bit of a headache and maybe a cold on top of that—understood. So, when would you like to come in and see the doctor?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is anyone available tomorrow morning?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! Let me just check that for you. We do have some openings tomorrow morning. Does around 10 a.m. work for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think it's too early for me. Can I, could I go, could I have some 11am?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, 11 a.m. works just fine. We can book you in at that time. And just to confirm, can I have your full name for the appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “My name is Yuna”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, got it. We’ll set that appointment for you at 11 a.m. under Jeong Yuna. And is there anything else you'd like us to know before you come in tomorrow?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Go to”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We’ll keep

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Could I go with my husband?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you're welcome to bring your husband along. We'll note that down. So, we’ll see you both tomorrow at 11 a.m. If you have any other questions, just let us know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is there any another waiting room for my husband?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We do have a little waiting area where your husband can be comfortable. So no worries at all. Now, is there anything else you need to know before tomorrow?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Could I have a ticket for car park?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We can absolutely arrange that. We'll have a parking ticket ready for you when you arrive. Anything else on your mind before you come in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How long is parking my car?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! The parking ticket will cover about two hours, which should be plenty of time for your appointment. And if you need more time, just let us know. Anything else you’d like to ask?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do I need to bring my Medicare card?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Just a quick rundown: you really just need to bring yourself and any ID or health insurance info you have. Other than that, we'll be all set for you. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Sorry, I don't understand. Please speak slowly.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I'll slow down. All you really need to bring tomorrow is your ID and any health insurance details if you have them. That's it. Let me know if that helps or if you have any other questions.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What can I get for health insurance?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! So basically, if you have a health insurance card or any document that shows your coverage, just bring that along. And if you don't have one, that's totally fine; we can figure it out when you arrive. Anything else you want to check on?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What can you do for a health insurance document? I want to know details.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! So, your health insurance document is usually just something like an insurance card or a paper that shows your policy number and your coverage. Just bringing that is helpful so we can register everything smoothly. Let me know if that makes sense or if you want more details!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: "I want to make appointment with woman doctor."

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We can definitely arrange for you to see a woman doctor. I'll make a note of that for your appointment. Anything else you'd like to ask about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you. No, that's fine. Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! We'll see you tomorrow then. Take care!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hello, I'd like to confirm my appointment for tomorrow.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! I'd be happy to help confirm that for you. Could you just remind me of your name for the appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “My name is Jeongyoon Ah.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, Jeong Yuna, I've got it. I can confirm your appointment is all set for tomorrow at 11 a.m. with a woman doctor as requested. If there's anything else you need, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Maybe this hospital is my first time, what can I, what items get to”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! So for your first visit, just bring a photo ID and your health insurance info if you have it. That's all you really need. We’ll take care of the rest once you arrive. Anything else you’re curious about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How long is the current rate?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! So right now the wait time is actually pretty minimal. We schedule things so that you should be seen pretty close to your appointment time. Usually just a few minutes of waiting if any. Let me know if that answers your question!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to know my booking doctor's name.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! The doctor you'll be seeing tomorrow is Dr. Kim. She's one of our female doctors on staff. If there's anything else you'd like to know, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is it okay if I come in 10 minutes later?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! That's perfectly fine. If you arrive about 10 minutes later, we can still fit you in. Just a heads-up to let the front desk know, and we'll make sure everything goes smoothly. Anything else you need?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm helping a friend book an appointment in English.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! You're doing great so far, and I'm happy to help. So let's get your friend's appointment set up. What day and time does your friend want to come in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Maybe he will go 2PM.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We can definitely do that. So let's set an appointment for your friend at 2 p.m. And just let me know their name and we'll get that booked in.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “He is Lee Hyunseung.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, got it! We’ll book a 2 p.m. appointment for Lee Hyun Su. That's all set. If there's anything else you need, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “He wants a male doctor. Can he?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We can definitely arrange a male doctor for him. I’ll make a note of that so he’ll be booked with one of our male physicians at 2 p.m. If there's anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to know.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! I'm here to help. What would you like to know next?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to know the doctor's name.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! For your friend's appointment, the male doctor he'll be seeing is Dr. Park. So he'll be in good hands. If there's anything else you need, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome! And if anything else comes up, just ask. I'm here to help.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I request a copy of my results after the visit?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! You can definitely request a copy of your results after your visit. Just let the front desk know or the doctor know at the end of your appointment, and they'll make sure to get that to you. Anything else you’d like to know?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is there a fee for a medical certificate?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! There is usually a small fee for a medical certificate, but it's pretty minimal. If you do need one, just ask and they'll let you know the exact amount. Anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How much is it exactly?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! So typically a medical certificate might cost just a small fee, usually around $10 to $20, depending on the clinic. So it's not too much. Let me know if that helps!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I get a script if I've already had this medication before?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! If you've had that medication before, the doctor can definitely write you a new prescription if it's appropriate. Just let them know what you've been taking, and they can sort that out for you. Anything else on your mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Sorry, I don't understand. Please speak slow down.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, I'll slow down a bit. In that case, yes, if you've had that medication before, the doctor can give you another prescription for it. Just tell them what you need and they'll take care of it. Let me know if that helps!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Excuse me, could I change my friend's booking?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We can absolutely change your friend's booking if you need to. Just let me know what new time or date works better and we'll adjust it.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What time it closed?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! The clinic usually closes around 6 p.m., so we have some flexibility if you need to shift things a bit earlier or later in the day. Just let me know what time you'd prefer!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can he change from 2pm to 5pm?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We can change his appointment from 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., no problem at all. I'll go ahead and update that so he’s all set for 5. Anything else you need?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Nothing. Thanks a lot.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! I'm glad I could help. Have a great day, and we'll see you at the clinic.
